terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1Text: By accessing and using LearnWithHistories, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, do not use the service.
terms.section2Text: You agree to use LearnWithHistories only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe upon the rights of others or restrict their use.
terms.section3Text: The content, design and functionality of LearnWithHistories are the intellectual property of LearnWithHistories or its content suppliers. You may not reproduce, distribute or transmit content without prior written permission.
terms.section4Text: LearnWithHistories is provided "as is". We do not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, secure or error-free. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages.
terms.section5Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes become effective when posted. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.section6Text: These terms are governed by applicable law, excluding conflict of law principles.
terms.section7Text: LearnWithHistories displays advertisements through Google AdSense and other advertising partners. These advertisements may include targeted ads based on your browsing history and interests. The presence of advertisements does not constitute an endorsement of any product or service advertised.
terms.section8Text: We use third-party services (Google Analytics, Google AdSense) to improve our platform and provide targeted advertisements. These services may collect information about your usage patterns. Please review the privacy policies of these services.
terms.contactUs: For questions about these terms, please contact us.
